title: Replication kit and formal artifact: The Projection Law — error geometry of model ensembles (classical potentials, foundation MLIPs, DFT implementations)
description: Two-tier replication kit for the Projection Law manuscript: Tier 1 reproduces every factorial statistic from committed raw data using NumPy alone; Tier 2 re-derives raw elastic constants from public model checkpoints with a bit-exact-regression harness. Includes pinned datasets for 559 classical interatomic potentials, 8 MatPES-trained foundation MLIPs, and 12 ACWF DFT method configurations; three pre-registrations with commit hashes; referee-driven robustness analyses; and pointers to the machine-checked Lean 4 theory core (77 build-locked theorems, ~225 declarations, zero sorry, zero new axioms).
notes: Before minting: replace the placeholder ORCID with the author's real ORCID, add arXiv/preprint DOIs for Papers 1 and 2 under related_identifiers, and confirm the MaterialsCloud DOI for the ACWF source data if required by the journal.
